calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-021: descending pain modulation during commitment
items.notes: 2-condition (NO_DESCENDING, WITH_DESCENDING) x 3 seeds. Fix: grid_size->size, WORLD_OBS_DIM 50->250, correct env/agent API.

items.title: MECH-220: cross-stream harm hub coordination
items.notes: 3-condition (NO_HUB, S_TO_A_HUB, BIDI_HUB) x 3 seeds. Fix: grid_size->size, WORLD_OBS_DIM 50->250, correct env/agent API.

items.title: MECH-205: surprise-gated replay write path fix validation
items.notes: Write path fix: rbf_field attr corrected, pe_ema_alpha=0.02 (was 0.1), pe_surprise_threshold=0.001. Same 2-cond x 3-seed design.
